relative_path: Protocols, instructions/Tissue dissociation, organoids and iPDCs/iPDC dissociation for RNA_DNA extraction.docx
full_text:
iPDC dissociation for DNA/RNA extraction

Important: for all the Eppendorfs to be stored, write down the sample ID, iPDC, and dX (for the number of days in culture), condition (e.g. control, OLA20 etc.), date and initials.

Samples for DNA / RNA extraction - use Organoid Harvesting Solution:

Collect the culture medium from all the conditions into an Eppendorf (approx. 1200 ul), keep it aside, on ice. Carefully aspirate the medium from the remaining wells using a suction pump.

Wash the wells 1x with cold sterile PBS.

Add organoid harvesting solution (Cultrex Organoid Harvesting solution; Catalog # 3700-100-01 ) 10x organoid volume per well (for 48-well plate organoids, add 300 uL per well). Incubate on the rocker at +4C room for about 60 mins. After the incubation time, bring the plate back into the laminar and break the ome-gel by pipetting up and down several times using a 1 mL pipet.

Spin the supernatant (collected at step 1.) at 1500 rpm for 10 min at +4 0C.

Collect the supernatant into a new clean Eppendorf and store at -80 0C.

From step 3., transfer the content from the wells into a 15 ml falcon tube.

Centrifuge at 1500 rpm for 10 min at +4 0C.

Remove the supernatant from step 7, add 1 mL of 1x with cold sterile PBS (in +4C fridge in cell culture room), and transfer the content from each 15 mL falcon to its own 1.5 mL Eppendorf. Centrifuge at 1500 rpm for f10 min at +4 0C. After the last centrifugation, remove supernatant and transfer the tube to -80 in a box named ONCOSYS-OVA (snap) frozen Organoids -80C, note down the position of the tubes and box name, for updating in the sample inventory sheet.

Samples for Flow - using Dispase + DMEM/F12:

Carefully aspirate the medium from the remaining wells using a suction pump.

Wash the wells 1x with RT sterile PBS.

Add 50 U/mL dispase stock to prewarmed DMEM-F12 (with HEPES, pen/strep and glutamax) to a final concentration of 1 U/mL.

For 48-well plate drops (40 uL each) use 300 uL of dispase + DMEM/F12 per well; e.g. mix 6 uL of 50 U/mL dispase stock and 294 uL DMEM/F12

After adding the dispase, detach the matrix from the well bottom by using a spatula.

Incubate at +37C for 20 mins. After the incubation, bring the plate back to laminar and pipet with a 1 mL pipet the content up and down for a couple of times to disrupt the drop. Continue the incubation for another 10-15 mins. NOTE! Do not exceed the time, since it can be harmful to the (immune) cells.

Transfer the content from all the wells into a 15 mL falcon and spin at 400g for 6 min at +4 (cell culture centrifuge). Remove the supernatant and add 900 uL of FACS staining buffer per condition (e.g. if having 2x 6 wells for STAINED and UNSTAINED, add 1´800 uL of staining buffer)

Carefully resuspend the pellet into the staining buffer and transfer the suspension into a corresponding number of 1.5 mL Eppendorfs.

Centrifuge at 400g for 6 min at +4 (Vähärautio centrifuge) and immediately proceed with flow cytometry protocol
